purpose: Validate quality bars and deliver decisions to coordinate merge approvals with snapshot stamping per TRACEABILITY. Enable Gatekeeper to evaluate all 8 quality bars and deliver pass/conditional pass/block decisions.
outcome: A gatecheck report with bar statuses (green/yellow/red), decision (pass/conditional pass/block), smallest viable fixes for yellow/red bars, and owner assignments—ready for merge approval or remediation.

steps.name: Gate Report Submission
steps.description: Owner signals work ready for gatecheck

steps.name: Evaluate All 8 Quality Bars
steps.description: Review against all bars; assign green/yellow/red status to each

steps.name: Decision & Smallest Viable Fixes
steps.description: Deliver pass/conditional pass/block decision with actionable remediation notes

steps.name: Remediation or Merge Approval
steps.description: If pass: approve merge. If conditional: route fixes to owner. If block: escalate.

inputs: TU Brief from owner (status: stabilizing → gatecheck)
Artifacts to review (Canon Pack, Codex entries, Topology notes, Art/Audio plans, etc.)
